Script.name: maze_solver_main
Script.script:
G_MazeSolver = type(G_MazeSolver) == "table" and G_MazeSolver or {} local M = G_MazeSolver
M.ms_basearea = M.ms_basearea or "" M.ms_room_table = M.ms_room_table or {} M.lastroom = M.lastroom or "" M.lastmove = M.lastmove or "" M.enablemap = M.enablemap or false M.visited = "" M.handlers = M.handlers or {}
local function maze_note(msg) if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho(string.format("<black:beige>[MazeSolver] %s\n", tostring(msg))) elseif type(echo) == "function" then echo("[MazeSolver] " .. tostring(msg) .. "\n") end end
local function gmcp_get(path) if type(gmcp) ~= "table" then return nil end local node = gmcp for part in string.gmatch(path, "[^.]+") do if type(node) ~= "table" then return nil end node = node[part] if node == nil then return nil end end return node end
local function room_info() local info = gmcp_get("room.info") or gmcp_get("Room.Info") if type(info) ~= "table" then return nil end local zone = info.zone or info.Zone local num = info.num or info.vnum or info.VNum local exits = info.exits or info.Exits if zone == nil or num == nil or type(exits) ~= "table" then return nil end
local normalized = {} for dir, val in pairs(exits) do normalized[tostring(dir)] = tostring(val) end
return { zone = tostring(zone), num = tostring(num), name = tostring(info.name or ""), details = tostring(info.details or ""), exits = normalized, } end
local function is_unmapped_exit(v) return tostring(v) == "-1" end
function AddRoom(tt) M.ms_basearea = tt.zone M.lastroom = tt.num
local troom = { num = tt.num, exits = tt.exits, area = tt.zone, name = tt.name, }
table.insert(M.ms_room_table, troom) maze_note("New room in area " .. M.ms_basearea .. ": " .. troom.num .. " " .. troom.name) end
function MazeDump() maze_note("Rooms in maze solver tables:") for _, room in ipairs(M.ms_room_table) do local x = string.format("Room: %s %s, %s", room.num, room.area, room.name) for k, v in pairs(room.exits) do x = x .. string.format(" %s->%s", k, v) end maze_note(x) end end
function MazeShowHelp() maze_note("----------------------------------------------------------------------------") maze_note("Maze solver") maze_note("#maze_help - this info") maze_note("#maze - clear Maze Solver tables") maze_note("#maze_dump - display rooms visited so far and exits") maze_note("#maze_next - try to go to next unmapped room") maze_note("#maze_goto <num> - go to room number <num>") maze_note("#maze_next_dir <e|s|w|u|d|n> - force specific direction") maze_note("----------------------------------------------------------------------------") end
function StartSolver() local tt = room_info() if not tt then maze_note("No gmcp room.info available yet.") return end M.ms_room_table = {} AddRoom(tt) end
function MazeNextRoom_dir(dir) dir = tostring(dir or "") if dir == "" then maze_note("Usage: #maze_next_dir <n|e|s|w|u|d>") return end
local tt = room_info() if not tt then maze_note("No gmcp room.info available yet.") return end
maze_note("Try to go " .. dir) M.lastroom = tt.num M.lastmove = dir M.enablemap = true send(dir) end
function FindPathFromTo(from, dest) M.visited = M.visited .. "," .. tostring(from)
for _, room in ipairs(M.ms_room_table) do if room.num == tostring(from) then for k, v in pairs(room.exits) do if tostring(v) == tostring(dest) then return k end end
for k, v in pairs(room.exits) do local vs = tostring(v) if not string.find(M.visited, "," .. vs, 1, true) and not is_unmapped_exit(vs) then local path = FindPathFromTo(vs, tostring(dest)) if path ~= "" then return k .. path end end end break end end
return "" end
function MazeGotoRoom(roomid) roomid = tostring(roomid or "") if roomid == "" then maze_note("Usage: #maze_goto <roomid>") return end
M.visited = "-1" local tt = room_info() if not tt then maze_note("No gmcp room.info available yet.") return end
local thisroom = tt.num if thisroom == roomid then maze_note("Already in room id: " .. thisroom) return end
local path = FindPathFromTo(thisroom, roomid) maze_note("Executing path: " .. path) if path ~= "" then send("run " .. path) end end
function MazeNextRoom() local tt = room_info() if not tt then maze_note("No gmcp room.info available yet.") return end
local thisroom = tt.num local done = false local roomInTable = false
for _, room in ipairs(M.ms_room_table) do if room.num == thisroom and room.area == tt.zone then for k, v in pairs(room.exits) do if is_unmapped_exit(v) then M.lastroom = thisroom M.lastmove = k M.enablemap = true send(k) done = true break end end roomInTable = true break end end
if not roomInTable then AddRoom(tt) return end
if done then return end
maze_note("Room " .. thisroom .. " is fully mapped, trying first unmapped room")
for _, room in ipairs(M.ms_room_table) do if room.area == tt.zone then for _, v in pairs(room.exits) do if is_unmapped_exit(v) then M.visited = "-1" local path = FindPathFromTo(thisroom, room.num) maze_note("Trying " .. room.num .. " path " .. path) if path ~= "" then send("run " .. path) return end break end end end end end
function MazeSolver_OnRepop() local tt = room_info() if not tt then return end
local removed = false for i = #M.ms_room_table, 1, -1 do if M.ms_room_table[i].area == tt.zone then table.remove(M.ms_room_table, i) removed = true end end
if removed then maze_note("Some rooms were removed due to repop in area " .. tt.zone) end end
function MazeSolver_OnRoomInfo() if not M.enablemap then return end
local tt = room_info() if not tt then return end
local thisroom = tt.num M.enablemap = false
local roomIsMapped = false for _, room in ipairs(M.ms_room_table) do if room.num == M.lastroom then room.exits[M.lastmove] = thisroom end
if room.num == thisroom then roomIsMapped = true end end
if not roomIsMapped then AddRoom(tt) end end
function MazeSolverInstall() if type(killAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" then for _, id in ipairs(M.handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, id) end end M.handlers = {}
if type(registerAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" then table.insert(M.handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.room.info", "MazeSolver_OnRoomInfo")) table.insert(M.handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.Info", "MazeSolver_OnRoomInfo")) table.insert(M.handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.comm.repop", "MazeSolver_OnRepop")) table.insert(M.handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Comm.Repop", "MazeSolver_OnRepop")) end
MazeShowHelp() end
MazeSolverInstall()
